section.heading: Prohibition on use of funds for construction

content.p: No funds appropriated to carry out this chapter, subchapter II of this chapter, or subchapter III of this chapter may be used for construction expenses.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–462, title II, § 210A, as added Pub. L. 108–81, title I, § 105, Sept. 25, 2003, 117 Stat. 997.)
